title: bridge-slack/teams/matrix: break on Disconnected loses queued relay events
description: bridge-slack/src/bridge.rs, bridge-teams/src/bridge.rs: on ClientEvent::Disconnected the main loop breaks and returns Ok(()). The main() function then exits the process. Any messages in the mpsc channel that were already enqueued (from Slack/Teams) but not yet forwarded to the relay are lost without a warning. Should drain the channel or at least log the count of dropped messages before exiting.
